name: supply-chain-guard
description: Local supply-chain install gate for npm packages and VS Code extensions with Socket, Codex, and PI review support.

scripts.test: bun test src/analysis.test.ts src/config.test.ts src/integrations.test.ts src/intelligence.test.ts src/lockfile.test.ts src/lockfile-policy.test.ts src/pm.test.ts src/fixtures.test.ts src/sbom.test.ts src/security-regression.test.ts src/skill-install.test.ts scripts/ansi-html.test.ts
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run src/cli.ts --help && bun run src/cli.ts self-test && bun run test
scripts.demo-screenshots: bun run scripts/capture-demos.ts && bun run scripts/generate-demo-screenshots.mjs
